# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://staging-app.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 300
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 120
          hour: 2000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

    routes:
      - name: users-public
        paths:
          - /v1/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: false
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 240
              hour: 4000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: users-private
        paths:
          - /v1/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 60
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders:8080
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 90
          hour: 1500
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

    routes:
      - name: orders-read
        paths:
          - /v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 150
              hour: 2500
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: orders-write
        paths:
          - /v1/orders
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              minute: 40
              hour: 700
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

consumers:
  - username: webapp
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_SECURE_API_KEY_WEBAPP"

  - username: adminapp
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_SECURE_API_KEY_ADMINAPP"
